disease_info.description: Psoriasis is a chronic autoimmune skin disorder where rapid skin cell turnover leads to thick, red plaques covered with silvery scales. Commonly affects elbows, knees, scalp, and lower back.
disease_info.common_symptoms: Silvery scales, thick plaques, redness, itching, dry cracked skin
disease_info.recommended_action: Use topical steroids, moisturizers, phototherapy, or systemic medications under dermatological supervision.
disease_info.image_indicators: Thick raised plaques, silver scales, sharply defined red borders
